SELECT * FROM Users

SELECT Name FROM Users

SELECT * FROM Users ORDER BY Age DESC
SELECT Name FROM Users ORDER BY Age DESC, Name ASC

SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE '%a'
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE '%a%'

SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name LIKE 'B_b'

Desc: Group By kulcs lekérése explicit alias nélkül.
SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role

Desc: Sima oszlop lekérése Group By után.
SqlInput: SELECT Name FROM Users GROUP BY Role

Desc: Group By kulcs és nem-kulcs oszlop vegyesen.
SqlInput: SELECT Role, Points FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, g.FirstOrDefault().Points }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role AS Feladatkor FROM Users GROUP BY Role
SELECT Role FROM Users WHERE Age > 20 GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age > 20).GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Age BETWEEN 20 AND 30
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Points + Bonus BETWEEN 50 AND 150
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE NOT Age = 18
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE NOT (Age < 18 OR Points < 10)
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE Name NOT LIKE 'A%'
SELECT * FROM Users ORDER BY Age
SELECT * FROM Users ORDER BY Points DESC
SELECT * FROM Users ORDER BY Role ASC, Age DESC
SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role

Desc: Group By kulccsal és aggregációval (AS alias).
SqlInput: SELECT Role, COUNT(Id) AS Db FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, Db = g.Count() }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, Total = g.Count() }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role, SUM(Points) AS OsszPont FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, OsszPont = g.Sum(x => x.Points) }).ToList()

Desc: Group By MIN és MAX aggregációval egyszerre.
SqlInput: SELECT Role, MIN(Age) AS MinKor, MAX(Age) AS MaxKor FROM Users GROUP BY Role
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, MinKor = g.Min(x => x.Age), MaxKor = g.Max(x => x.Age) }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role HAVING COUNT(*) > 2
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Count() > 2).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role HAVING SUM(Points) >= 100
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Sum(x => x.Points) >= 100).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

Desc: WHERE és GROUP BY és ORDER BY kombinációja.
SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users WHERE Age > 18 GROUP BY Role ORDER BY Role DESC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age > 18).GroupBy(x => x.Role).OrderByDescending(g => g.Key).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

Desc: Teljes lánc: WHERE, GROUP BY, HAVING, ORDER BY.
SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users WHERE Age >= 18 GROUP BY Role HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY Role ASC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age >= 18).GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Count() > 1).OrderBy(g => g.Key).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 AND SUM(Bonus) > 10
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Count() > 1 && g.Sum(x => x.Bonus) > 10).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name AS Nev, Age AS Kor FROM Users ORDER BY Kor DESC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.OrderByDescending(x => x.Age).Select(x => new { Nev = x.Name, Kor = x.Age }).ToList()

SELECT Name FROM Users ORDER BY CASE WHEN Role = 'Admin' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END

Desc: NULLIF egyenlő értékek esetén null-t ad.
SqlInput: SELECT NULLIF(Role, 'Guest') AS FilteredRole FROM Users
SELECT * FROM Users WHERE UPPER(Name) LIKE 'A%'
SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE LENGTH(Name) >= 3 ORDER BY LENGTH(Name) DESC
SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u INNER JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

Desc: INNER JOIN a join feltétel fordított sorrendjével.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON o.owner = u.id
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u CROSS JOIN Orders o ON 1 = 1
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.SelectMany(u => db.Orders, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

Desc: Két láncolt INNER JOIN, három táblán keresztül.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item, p.title FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner JOIN Products p ON o.id = p.parent
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Join(db.Products, j1 => j1.o.Id, p => p.Parent, (j1, p) => new { j1.u, j1.o, p }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item, x.p.Title }).ToList()

Desc: Négy láncolt INNER JOIN, öt táblán keresztül.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item, p.title, c.label, w.location FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner JOIN Products p ON o.id = p.parent JOIN Categories c ON p.id = c.parent JOIN Warehouses w ON c.id = w.parent
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Join(db.Products, j1 => j1.o.Id, p => p.Parent, (j1, p) => new { j1.u, j1.o, p }).Join(db.Categories, j2 => j2.p.Id, c => c.Parent, (j2, c) => new { j2.u, j2.o, j2.p, c }).Join(db.Warehouses, j3 => j3.c.Id, w => w.Parent, (j3, w) => new { j3.u, j3.o, j3.p, j3.c, w }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item, x.p.Title, x.c.Label, x.w.Location }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupJoin(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, _o) => new { u, _o }).SelectMany(gj => gj._o.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, o) => new { gj.u, o }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

Desc: LEFT OUTER JOIN explicit OUTER kulcsszóval.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u LEFT OUTER JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupJoin(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, _o) => new { u, _o }).SelectMany(gj => gj._o.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, o) => new { gj.u, o }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u RIGHT JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner
ExpectedLinq: db.Orders.GroupJoin(db.Users, o => o.Owner, u => u.Id, (o, _u) => new { o, _u }).SelectMany(gj => gj._u.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, u) => new { gj.o, u }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner WHERE u.age > 20
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Where(x => x.u.Age > 20).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner ORDER BY u.name ASC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, o) => new { u, o }).OrderBy(x => x.u.Name).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

Desc: INNER JOIN WHERE és LIMIT kombinációval.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.qty FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner WHERE o.qty > 1 LIMIT 3
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Where(x => x.o.Qty > 1).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Qty }).Take(3).ToList()

Desc: LEFT JOIN WHERE feltétellel a bal táblán.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner WHERE u.age >= 25
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupJoin(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, _o) => new { u, _o }).SelectMany(gj => gj._o.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, o) => new { gj.u, o }).Where(x => x.u.Age >= 25).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

Desc: LEFT JOIN ORDER BY DESC és LIMIT.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner ORDER BY u.name DESC LIMIT 4
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupJoin(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, _o) => new { u, _o }).SelectMany(gj => gj._o.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, o) => new { gj.u, o }).OrderByDescending(x => x.u.Name).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).Take(4).ToList()

Desc: RIGHT JOIN fordított ON feltétel sorrenddel.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u RIGHT JOIN Orders o ON o.owner = u.id
ExpectedLinq: db.Orders.GroupJoin(db.Users, o => o.Owner, u => u.Id, (o, _u) => new { o, _u }).SelectMany(gj => gj._u.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, u) => new { gj.o, u }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u RIGHT JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner WHERE o.qty > 1
ExpectedLinq: db.Orders.GroupJoin(db.Users, o => o.Owner, u => u.Id, (o, _u) => new { o, _u }).SelectMany(gj => gj._u.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, u) => new { gj.o, u }).Where(x => x.o.Qty > 1).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

Desc: INNER JOIN majd LEFT JOIN láncolva.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item, p.title FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner LEFT JOIN Products p ON o.id = p.parent
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, o) => new { u, o }).GroupJoin(db.Products, j1 => j1.o.Id, p => p.Parent, (j1, _p) => new { j1, _p }).SelectMany(gj => gj._p.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, p) => new { gj.j1.u, gj.j1.o, p }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item, x.p.Title }).ToList()

Desc: LEFT JOIN fordított ON feltétel sorrenddel.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Orders o ON o.owner = u.id
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupJoin(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, _o) => new { u, _o }).SelectMany(gj => gj._o.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, o) => new { gj.u, o }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner WHERE o.item = 'Laptop'
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupJoin(db.Orders, u => u.Id, o => o.Owner, (u, _o) => new { u, _o }).SelectMany(gj => gj._o.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, o) => new { gj.u, o }).Where(x => x.o.Item == "Laptop").Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

Desc: RIGHT JOIN ORDER BY a jobb táblán.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u RIGHT JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner ORDER BY o.item ASC
ExpectedLinq: db.Orders.GroupJoin(db.Users, o => o.Owner, u => u.Id, (o, _u) => new { o, _u }).SelectMany(gj => gj._u.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, u) => new { gj.o, u }).OrderBy(x => x.o.Item).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

Desc: RIGHT OUTER JOIN explicit OUTER kulcsszóval.
SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u RIGHT OUTER JOIN Orders o ON u.id = o.owner
ExpectedLinq: db.Orders.GroupJoin(db.Users, o => o.Owner, u => u.Id, (o, _u) => new { o, _u }).SelectMany(gj => gj._u.DefaultIfEmpty(), (gj, u) => new { gj.o, u }).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT a.name, b.name AS bname FROM Users a JOIN Users b ON a.id = b.id
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Users, a => a.Id, b => b.Id, (a, b) => new { a, b }).Select(x => new { x.a.Name, bname = x.b.Name }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT a.name, b.role FROM Users a JOIN Users b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.age > 20
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Users, a => a.Id, b => b.Id, (a, b) => new { a, b }).Where(x => x.a.Age > 20).Select(x => new { x.a.Name, x.b.Role }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT a.name, b.role FROM Users a JOIN Users b ON a.id = b.id ORDER BY a.name ASC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Join(db.Users, a => a.Id, b => b.Id, (a, b) => new { a, b }).OrderBy(x => x.a.Name).Select(x => new { x.a.Name, x.b.Role }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT a.name, b.name AS bname FROM Users a JOIN Users b ON a.points > b.points
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.SelectMany(a => db.Users, (a, b) => new { a, b }).Where(x => x.a.Points > x.b.Points).Select(x => new { x.a.Name, bname = x.b.Name }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT a.name, b.name AS bname FROM Users a JOIN Users b ON a.age < b.age
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.SelectMany(a => db.Users, (a, b) => new { a, b }).Where(x => x.a.Age < x.b.Age).Select(x => new { x.a.Name, bname = x.b.Name }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON u.points > o.qty
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.SelectMany(u => db.Orders, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Where(x => x.u.Points > x.o.Qty).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT u.name, o.item FROM Users u JOIN Orders o ON u.points >= o.qty WHERE u.age > 20
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.SelectMany(u => db.Orders, (u, o) => new { u, o }).Where(x => x.u.Points >= x.o.Qty).Where(x => x.u.Age > 20).Select(x => new { x.u.Name, x.o.Item }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name, Points FROM Users WHERE ABS(Points) > 50
SELECT Name, FLOOR(Points) AS FloorPoints FROM Users
SELECT Name, CEIL(Points) AS CeilPoints FROM Users

Desc: ABS és FLOOR kombinálva WHERE-ben és SELECT-ben.
SqlInput: SELECT Name, ABS(Bonus) AS AbsBonus, FLOOR(Points) AS FloorPts FROM Users WHERE ABS(Bonus) > 5
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => Math.Abs((int)(x.Bonus)) > 5).Select(x => new { x.Name, AbsBonus = Math.Abs((int)(x.Bonus)), FloorPts = Math.Floor((double)(x.Points)) }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role, SUM(Points) AS TotalPoints FROM Users GROUP BY Role ORDER BY TotalPoints DESC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).OrderByDescending(g => g.FirstOrDefault().TotalPoints).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, TotalPoints = g.Sum(x => x.Points) }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role FROM Users GROUP BY Role HAVING MAX(Age) > MIN(Age)
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Max(x => x.Age) > g.Min(x => x.Age)).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key }).ToList()

Desc: ORDER BY alias és HAVING kombinálva.
SqlInput: SELECT Role, COUNT(*) AS Total FROM Users GROUP BY Role HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY Total DESC
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Count() > 1).OrderByDescending(g => g.FirstOrDefault().Total).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, Total = g.Count() }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name || Role AS FullLabel FROM Users
SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE Name || Role = 'BobAdmin'
SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE Age > 25 UNION SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE Role = 'Admin'
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age > 25).Select(x => new { Name = x.Name }).Union(db.Users.Where(x => x.Role == "Admin").Select(x => new { Name = x.Name })).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE Age > 25 UNION ALL SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE Role = 'Admin'
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age > 25).Select(x => new { Name = x.Name }).Concat(db.Users.Where(x => x.Role == "Admin").Select(x => new { Name = x.Name })).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE Age > 30 UNION SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE Role = 'Admin' UNION SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE Points > 100
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Age > 30).Select(x => new { Name = x.Name }).Union(db.Users.Where(x => x.Role == "Admin").Select(x => new { Name = x.Name })).Union(db.Users.Where(x => x.Points > 100).Select(x => new { Name = x.Name })).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name, Age FROM Users WHERE Role = 'Admin' UNION ALL SELECT Name, Age FROM Users WHERE Points > 100
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Where(x => x.Role == "Admin").Select(x => new { Name = x.Name, Age = x.Age }).Concat(db.Users.Where(x => x.Points > 100).Select(x => new { Name = x.Name, Age = x.Age })).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name || ' ' || Role AS FullLabel FROM Users
SELECT Name, POWER(Points, 2) AS Squared FROM Users
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Select(x => new { Name = x.Name, Squared = Math.Pow((double)(x.Points), (double)(2)) }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name, SIGN(Bonus) AS BonusSign FROM Users
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Select(x => new { Name = x.Name, BonusSign = Math.Sign((int)(x.Bonus)) }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Role, AVG(Age) AS AvgAge FROM Users GROUP BY Role HAVING AVG(Age) BETWEEN 20 AND 40
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => x.Role).Where(g => g.Average(x => x.Age) >= 20 && g.Average(x => x.Age) <= 40).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key, AvgAge = g.Average(x => x.Age) }).ToList()

Desc: GROUP BY több kulccsal és SUM.
SqlInput: SELECT Role, Age, SUM(Points) AS TotalPoints FROM Users GROUP BY Role, Age
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.GroupBy(x => new { x.Role, x.Age }).Select(g => new { Role = g.Key.Role, Age = g.Key.Age, TotalPoints = g.Sum(x => x.Points) }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE CASE WHEN Age > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1
SELECT Name, CASE WHEN Age > 40 THEN 'Senior' WHEN Age > 25 THEN 'Mid' ELSE 'Junior' END AS Level FROM Users

Desc: SELECT DISTINCT több oszloppal és WHERE.
SqlInput: SELECT DISTINCT Role, Age FROM Users WHERE Points > 50
SELECT UPPER(Name) AS UpperName, LOWER(Role) AS LowerRole FROM Users
ExpectedLinq: db.Users.Select(x => new { UpperName = x.Name.ToUpper(), LowerRole = x.Role.ToLower() }).ToList()

SqlInput: SELECT Name FROM Users WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(Name)) > 3
